articles.title: New Arrivals From HBX: Maison Mihara Yasuhiro
articles.summary: Brand Information: Mihara Yasuhiro is a Japan-based designer who made his name in the fashion industry by creating unique footwear and partnering with global sneaker giants like PUMA. In 1994, Yasuhiro launched his first line of shoes while studying at Tama Art University. His designs were well-received and highly praised for their innovative and modern designs. Yasuhiro eventually launched his eponymous shoe label Maison Mihara Yasuhiro in 1998. As the label's genesis, Yasuhiro still plays an integral part in directing its vision and culture. Maison Mihara Yasuhiro has since diversified into menswear collections and continues to expand globally.Price Range: $235.00 USD - $1,540.00 USDWhere to Buy: Available now on HBX Click here to view full gallery at Hypebeast

articles.title: Tomica and Converse Team Up for a Unique "Dream Tomica All Star Collection Vol.1"
articles.summary: SummaryTakara Tomy's imaginative "Dream Tomica" line is collaborating with Converse to release the "Dream Tomica Converse All Star Collection Vol.1" in June 2026The unique die-cast toy cars are modeled after the iconic Converse All Star sneaker, featuring a driver's seat hidden inside the shoeThe toy features a removable high-top (HI) section, allowing collectors to seamlessly switch the design and display it as a low-cut (OX) sneakerThe world of sneakers and die-cast toys is colliding in the most delightful way. Takara Tomy’s popular "Dream Tomica" series has officially announced a highly unique crossover with Converse, introducing the "Dream Tomica Converse All Star Collection Vol.1." articles.title: The BEAMS x Paraboot Corsica Loafer Boat Shoe Is Peak Prep
articles.summary: Name: BEAMS x Paraboot CorsicaColorway: BlackSKU: 11320875099MSRP: ￥62,700 JPY (approx. $390 USD)Release Date: Available nowWhere to Buy: BEAMSBEAMS and Paraboot have joined forces to deliver an exclusive iteration of the classic Corsica. Serving as a hybrid silhouette, the collaborative model successfully merges the laid-back profile of a deck shoe with the refined structure of a traditional coin loafer.Crafted in Spain, the upper takes on a bold, asymmetric "crazy pattern" design that BEAMS is renowned for bringing to its collaborative projects. The shoe meticulously incorporates three distinct textures of premium cow leather across its paneling: a pebbled grain finish, a glossy smooth leather, and a soft, textural suede. articles.title: Chupps Footwear Onboards Ajinkya Rahane as Investor, Advisor in Pre-Series B Round
articles.summary: D2C footwear brand Chupps Footwear has brought on board cricketer Ajinkya Rahane as an equity investor and strategic advisor as part of its pre-Series B funding round. The company has not disclosed the size of the investment, although it confirmed that existing investors also participated, signalling continued backing for its expansion plans. The latest fundraise […] The post Chupps Footwear Onboards Ajinkya Rahane as Investor, Advisor in Pre-Series B Round appeared first on Apparel Resources .

articles.title: Kering Reports Stable Q1 2026 Revenue with Fashion and Leather Goods at €2.85 Billion
articles.summary: Kering reported revenue of €3.56 Billion in the first quarter of 2026, remaining stable on a comparable basis despite a tough global environment. The French luxury group saw mixed performance across regions and brands, with early signs of recovery led by jewelry and select fashion houses. Kering recorded a 6% decline in reported revenue year-on-year. ... Read more
